sentences.target: Je passe le bac cette année.

translations.fr: Je passe le bac cette année.
translations.en: I’m taking the bac this year.
translations.es: Este año me examino del bachillerato.
translations.de: Ich mache dieses Jahr das Abitur.
translations.ru: Я сдаю французский бакалавриат в этом году.
translations.pt: Vou fazer o baccalauréat este ano.
translations.vi: Năm nay tôi thi tú tài.
translations.uk: Цього року я складаю французький іспит на атестат.
translations.hi: मैं इस साल फ्रांसीसी बैकलॉरिएट दे रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar videregående eksamen i år.
translations.id: Saya ikut ujian kelulusan SMA tahun ini.
translations.ja: 私は今年バカロレアを受けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; refers to the speaker.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive here with direct object 'le bac'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'bac'.
Common noun; direct object of 'passe'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; agrees with 'année' to form a temporal NP.
Feminine noun; part of the time expression 'cette année' functioning as temporal complement.

sentences.target: Tu révises le bac avec moi.

translations.fr: Tu révises le bac avec moi.
translations.en: You’re studying for the bac with me.
translations.de: Du lernst mit mir fürs Abitur.
translations.it: Ripassi per la maturità con me.
translations.zh-Hans: 你和我一起复习法国高考。
translations.yue: 你同我一齊溫法國高考。
translations.ru: Ты готовишься к бакалавриату со мной.
translations.pt: Você estuda para o baccalauréat comigo.
translations.vi: Bạn ôn thi tú tài với tôi.
translations.nl: Je leert met mij voor het eindexamen.
translations.uk: Ти готуєшся до французького іспиту на атестат зі мною.
translations.hi: तुम मेरे साथ फ्रांसीसी बैकलॉरिएट की तैयारी कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Uczysz się ze mną do matury.
translations.el: Διαβάζεις για το μπακαλορεά μαζί μου.
translations.nb: Du leser til eksamen sammen med meg.
translations.id: Kamu belajar untuk ujian kelulusan SMA bersama saya.
translations.sv: Du pluggar till studenten med mig.
translations.cs: Učíš se se mnou na maturitu.
translations.da: Du læser til studentereksamen sammen med mig.
translations.ja: あなたは私と一緒にバカロレアの勉強をする。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular informal.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive with object 'le bac'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'bac'.
Common noun; direct object of 'révises'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional complement 'moi'.
Stressed (tonic) pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Mon frère a eu son bac hier.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a y sɔ̃ bak jɛʁ/

translations.fr: Mon frère a eu son bac hier.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ fʁɛʁ a y sɔ̃ bak jɛʁ/
translations.en: My brother got his bac yesterday.
translations.es: Mi hermano aprobó el bachillerato ayer.
translations.de: Mein Bruder hat gestern sein Abitur bestanden.
translations.it: Mio fratello ha passato la maturità ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥昨天通过了法国高考。
translations.yue: 我哥哥噚日通過咗法國高考。
translations.pt: Meu irmão passou no baccalauréat ontem.
translations.he: אח שלי עבר את הבגרות הצרפתית אתמול.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi đã đậu tú tài hôm qua.
translations.nl: Mijn broer heeft gisteren zijn eindexamen gehaald.
translations.uk: Мій брат учора склав французький іспит на атестат.
translations.hu: A testvérem tegnap letette az érettségit.
translations.hi: मेरे भाई ने कल फ्रांसीसी बैकलॉरिएट पास किया.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου πέρασε το μπακαλορεά χθες.
translations.nb: Broren min besto eksamen i går.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya lulus ujian kelulusan SMA kemarin.
translations.sv: Min bror tog studenten i går.
translations.ro: Fratele meu a luat bacul ieri.
translations.da: Min bror bestod studentereksamen i går.
translations.ja: 兄は昨日バカロレアに合格しました。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'frère'.
Masculine noun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé with 'eu'.
Past participle; main verb in compound tense with 'a', taking 'son bac' as object.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; introduces 'bac'.
Common noun; direct object of 'eu'.
Temporal adverb; specifies when the action occurred.

sentences.target: On fête le bac au café.

translations.fr: On fête le bac au café.
translations.en: We’re celebrating the bac at the café.
translations.es: Celebramos el bachillerato en el café.
translations.de: Wir feiern das Abitur im Café.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆庆祝法国高考。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店慶祝法國高考。
translations.pt: Estamos comemorando o baccalauréat no café.
translations.he: אנחנו חוגגים את הבגרות הצרפתית בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn mừng tú tài ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We vieren het eindexamen in het café.
translations.uk: Ми святкуємо французький іспит на атестат у кафе.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में फ्रांसीसी बैकलॉरिएट का जश्न मना रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami merayakan ujian kelulusan SMA di kafe.
translations.ja: カフェでバカロレアをお祝いします。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun commonly used for 'we'; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'bac'.
Common noun; direct object of 'fête'.
Preposition contracted with the article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement 'café'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'à' (via the contraction 'au'), indicating location.
